title: Display full project titles on chart widget (X & Y axis)
excerpt: The modifiable formatting of the dashboard widget “chart” is very limited. If a project on the X or Y axis has a title longer then approximately 12 characters, it is cut off. This makes the chart as a reference fairly us…

posts.author: wscott (Will Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
The modifiable formatting of the dashboard widget “chart” is very limited. If a project on the X or Y axis has a title longer then approximately 12 characters, it is cut off. This makes the chart as a reference fairly useless because the data can’t be associated to a specific project unless the viewer has the project titles memorized.

It would be great to have the ability to customize the formatting: x/y axis project title character limit, title orientation (horizontal/vertical), text color, etc.
